# F072 Image Latent Ceiling Audit

## Decision
`F072_IMAGE_LATENT_NONORACLE_REDUCES_MISMATCH`

## Purpose
F071 showed image observations can recover synthetic `z_bio` with train-only oracle supervision. F072 removes the oracle `z_bio` target and tests whether non-oracle image PCA or train-only RNA-to-image-latent prediction already carries the useful transition geometry.

## Key Results
- observed RNA abs transition optimism: `0.058406`
- observed RNA abs delta optimism: `0.088751`
- image PCA abs transition optimism: `0.023180`
- image PCA abs delta optimism: `0.052534`
- RNA-to-image abs transition optimism: `0.065888`
- RNA-to-image abs delta optimism: `0.167492`
- RNA-to-image eval image-latent cosine: `0.588568`
- best non-oracle representation: `image_to_rna_pca_ridge`

## Leakage And Promotion Status
- No model is promoted.
- PCA and cross-modal ridge fits use train rows only.
- Eval rows are used only for scoring.
- Non-oracle branches do not use synthetic `z_bio`, `condition_key`, `biological_key`, exact heldout action one-hot, eval target means, or pooled train+test statistics.
